nodes.context: Organised street gang based in Woolwich, south-east London, involved in drug trafficking and contract killing.
Younger offshoot of the Woolwich Boys, mostly active in violent street crime.

edges.evidence_quote: Younger offshoots of the gang like the so-called Younger Woolwich Boys are mostly active in violent street crime
edges.context: Younger Woolwich Boys is an offshoot of the Woolwich Boys.
